description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every push and pull request. Use a matrix job strategy to test across multiple operating systems (ubuntu-20.04, macOS-10.15, windows-2019), Python versions (3.6 to 3.10), and variants (py, py-images). For each matrix combination, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install tox and codecov, run tests with tox, and report coverage to codecov using a secret token.
